title: Kapitel 7 - Links stylen Check

questions.prompt: Which selector styles a link while the mouse is over it?

explanations.overview: Use the :hover pseudo-class for hover state styling.

byOptionId.a: Not quite. Use the :hover pseudo-class for hover state styling.
byOptionId.b: Correct. Use the :hover pseudo-class for hover state styling.
byOptionId.c: Not quite. Use the :hover pseudo-class for hover state styling.
byOptionId.d: Not quite. Use the :hover pseudo-class for hover state styling.

questions.prompt: Which declaration removes the default link underline?

byOptionId.a: Not quite. text-decoration: none; removes the underline.
byOptionId.b: Not quite. text-decoration: none; removes the underline.
byOptionId.c: Correct. text-decoration: none; removes the underline.
byOptionId.d: Not quite. text-decoration: none; removes the underline.
